code:
stateDiagram-v2
    [HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault] --> AppInitialization
    
    AppInitialization --> PerformanceAssessment : Start Performance Monitor
    
    PerformanceAssessment --> DeviceCapabilityCheck
    DeviceCapabilityCheck --> InitialModeSelection
    
    InitialModeSelection --> UltraFastMode : Low-end Device
    InitialModeSelection --> FastMode : Mid-range Device
    InitialModeSelection --> BalancedMode : High-end Device
    InitialModeSelection --> HighQualityMode : Premium Device
    
    state UltraFastMode {HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault] --> QuarterResolution
        QuarterResolution --> BasicFaceDetection
        BasicFaceDetection --> MinimalProcessing
        MinimalProcessing --> LowBatteryUsage
        LowBatteryUsage --> PerformanceMonitoring
    }
    
    state FastMode {HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault] --> HalfResolution
        HalfResolution --> FaceDetection
        FaceDetection --> BasicNSFWDetection
        BasicNSFWDetection --> ModerateBatteryUsage
        ModerateBatteryUsage --> PerformanceMonitoring
    }
    
    state BalancedMode {HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine] --> FullResolution
        FullResolution --> CompleteFaceDetection
        CompleteFaceDetection --> FullNSFWDetection
        FullNSFWDetection --> GenderClassification
        GenderClassification --> OptimalBatteryUsage
        OptimalBatteryUsage --> PerformanceMonitoring
    }
    
    state HighQualityMode {HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine] --> EnhancedResolution
        EnhancedResolution --> AdvancedFaceDetection
        AdvancedFaceDetection --> EnhancedNSFWDetection
        EnhancedNSFWDetection --> DetailedGenderClassification
        DetailedGenderClassification --> ContentDensityAnalysis
        ContentDensityAnalysis --> HighBatteryUsage
        HighBatteryUsage --> PerformanceMonitoring
    }
    
    PerformanceMonitoring --> ContinuousMonitoring
    
    state ContinuousMonitoring {HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault] --> CPUUsageCheck
        CPUUsageCheck --> MemoryUsageCheck
        MemoryUsageCheck --> BatteryLevelCheck
        BatteryLevelCheck --> ThermalStateCheck
        ThermalStateCheck --> NetworkLatencyCheck
        NetworkLatencyCheck --> PerformanceDecision
    }
    
    PerformanceDecision --> MaintainCurrentMode : Performance Good
    PerformanceDecision --> DegradePerformance : Performance Issues
    PerformanceDecision --> ImprovePerformance : Resources Available
    
    state DegradePerformance {HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine] --> ReduceDetectionFrequency
        ReduceDetectionFrequency --> LowerResolution
        LowerResolution --> DisableNonEssentialFeatures
        DisableNonEssentialFeatures --> IncreaseCacheUsage
        IncreaseCacheUsage --> OptimizeMemoryUsage
    }
    
    state ImprovePerformance {HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault] --> IncreaseDetectionQuality
        IncreaseDetectionQuality --> HigherResolution
        HigherResolution --> EnableAdditionalFeatures
        EnableAdditionalFeatures --> ReduceCacheDependency
        ReduceCacheDependency --> EnhancePrecision
    }
    
    DegradePerformance --> AdaptiveAdjustment
    ImprovePerformance --> AdaptiveAdjustment
    MaintainCurrentMode --> AdaptiveAdjustment
    
    state AdaptiveAdjustment {HealthTech_LabAnalyzer] --> ApplyChanges
        ApplyChanges --> TestNewSettings
        TestNewSettings --> ValidatePerformance
        ValidatePerformance --> UpdateConfiguration
    }
    
    AdaptiveAdjustment --> ContinuousMonitoring : Return to Monitoring
    
    %% Emergency scenarios
    ContinuousMonitoring --> EmergencyMode : Critical Performance Issue
    
    state EmergencyMode {HealthTech_EMR_Sync] --> MinimalDetection
        MinimalDetection --> CriticalFeaturesOnly
        CriticalFeaturesOnly --> MaximumCaching
        MaximumCaching --> EmergencyOptimization
        EmergencyOptimization --> GradualRecovery
    }
    
    EmergencyMode --> ContinuousMonitoring : Performance Recovered
    
    %% User-triggered changes
    ContinuousMonitoring --> UserModeChange : User Changes Settings
    
    state UserModeChange {HealthTech_EMR_Sync] --> ValidateUserChoice
        ValidateUserChoice --> ApplyUserSettings
        ApplyUserSettings --> WarnIfIncompatible
        WarnIfIncompatible --> AcceptOverride
    }
    
    UserModeChange --> ContinuousMonitoring : Settings Applied
    
    %% Battery-specific optimizations
    ContinuousMonitoring --> BatteryOptimization : Low Battery Detected
    
    state BatteryOptimization {HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine] --> ReduceProcessingFrequency
        ReduceProcessingFrequency --> DisableBackgroundFeatures
        DisableBackgroundFeatures --> MinimizeCPUIntensiveTasks
        MinimizeCPUIntensiveTasks --> EnableDeepCaching
        EnableDeepCaching --> BatterySaveMode
    }
    
    BatteryOptimization --> ContinuousMonitoring : Battery Level Improved
    
    %% Thermal management
    ContinuousMonitoring --> ThermalThrottling : Overheating Detected
    
    state ThermalThrottling {HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine] --> ReduceProcessorUsage
        ReduceProcessorUsage --> IncreaseProcessingIntervals
        IncreaseProcessingIntervals --> DisableGPUAcceleration
        DisableGPUAcceleration --> CooldownPause
        CooldownPause --> ThermalRecovery
    }
    
    ThermalThrottling --> ContinuousMonitoring : Temperature Normal
    
    note right of UltraFastMode
        Basic protection with minimal resource usage
        - Face detection only
        - 224x224 resolution
        - 500ms intervals
        - ~2% battery/hour
    end note
    
    note right of BalancedMode
        Recommended mode for most users
        - Full feature set
        - Native resolution
        - 2000ms intervals
        - ~5-8% battery/hour
    end note
    
    note right of HighQualityMode
        Maximum accuracy and features
        - Enhanced processing
        - Content density analysis
        - 3000ms intervals
        - ~12-15% battery/hour
    end note
compilation_error: [WinError 2] 系统找不到指定的文件。

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要设计一个医疗AI应用的自适应性能管理系统，核心是从HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault启动后的初始化流程开始。
明白，所以启动后要立即进入性能评估阶段？这个评估应该包含设备能力检测吧？
对，DeviceCapabilityCheck之后要做InitialModeSelection，根据设备档次分成四种运行模式：低端走UltraFastMode，中端走FastMode，高端走BalancedMode，旗舰机走HighQualityMode。
好的，四种模式我都建好了。UltraFastMode我设计成从HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault进入QuarterResolution，然后做BasicFaceDetection，这个模式主要保证基础人脸检测，分辨率降到四分之一。
UltraFastMode后面要接MinimalProcessing和LowBatteryUsage，最后到PerformanceMonitoring。FastMode类似，但是用HalfResolution，检测模块升级到FaceDetection和BasicNSFWDetection，电池消耗是ModerateBatteryUsage。
BalancedMode和HighQualityMode的入口是不是应该换成HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine？这两个模式功能更完整，和诊断引擎关联更紧密。

可以，BalancedMode走FullResolution、CompleteFaceDetection、FullNSFWDetection，还要加上GenderClassification和OptimalBatteryUsage。HighQualityMode用EnhancedResolution，检测升级到AdvancedFaceDetection和EnhancedNSFWDetection，再加DetailedGenderClassification和ContentDensityAnalysis。
HighQualityMode的电池消耗我标记为HighBatteryUsage，四个模式最后都汇聚到PerformanceMonitoring。接下来是不是要设计持续监控机制？
对，PerformanceMonitoring之后进入ContinuousMonitoring状态，这个要做得详细一些，包含CPUUsageCheck、MemoryUsageCheck、BatteryLevelCheck、ThermalStateCheck、NetworkLatencyCheck，最后到PerformanceDecision。
ContinuousMonitoring我设置从HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault进入，这样和安全存储保持关联。PerformanceDecision有三个分支：性能良好走MaintainCurrentMode，有问题走DegradePerformance，资源充足走ImprovePerformance。

DegradePerformance需要HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine参与，流程是ReduceDetectionFrequency、LowerResolution、DisableNonEssentialFeatures、IncreaseCacheUsage、OptimizeMemoryUsage。ImprovePerformance留在HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault体系，走IncreaseDetectionQuality、HigherResolution、EnableAdditionalFeatures、ReduceCacheDependency、EnhancePrecision。
三个决策分支最后都要到AdaptiveAdjustment对吧？这个调整模块用哪个系统组件？
AdaptiveAdjustment用HealthTech_LabAnalyzer，流程是ApplyChanges、TestNewSettings、ValidatePerformance、UpdateConfiguration。完成后返回ContinuousMonitoring继续监控。
我想到还需要紧急模式，ContinuousMonitoring检测到Critical Performance Issue时要能进入EmergencyMode，这个用HealthTech_EMR_Sync比较合适，毕竟是紧急医疗记录同步场景。
可以，EmergencyMode走MinimalDetection、CriticalFeaturesOnly、MaximumCaching、EmergencyOptimization，最后GradualRecovery，恢复后返回ContinuousMonitoring。
用户主动修改设置的情况也要覆盖，ContinuousMonitoring检测到User Changes Settings时进入UserModeChange，同样用HealthTech_EMR_Sync。
UserModeChange要有兼容性检查，流程是ValidateUserChoice、ApplyUserSettings、WarnIfIncompatible，如果用户坚持就AcceptOverride。
设置完成，UserModeChange结束后返回ContinuousMonitoring。低电量场景需要单独处理吗？

需要，ContinuousMonitoring检测到Low Battery Detected时进入BatteryOptimization，用HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine，走ReduceProcessingFrequency、DisableBackgroundFeatures、MinimizeCPUIntensiveTasks、EnableDeepCaching，最后到BatterySaveMode。
电池恢复后也返回ContinuousMonitoring。那过热情况呢？ThermalStateCheck应该能触发什么？
ThermalStateCheck如果检测到Overheating就进入ThermalThrottling，同样用HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine，流程是ReduceProcessorUsage、IncreaseProcessingIntervals、DisableGPUAcceleration、CooldownPause，最后ThermalRecovery。
温度正常后返回ContinuousMonitoring。现在主要状态都齐了，我需要在UltraFastMode、BalancedMode和HighQualityMode旁边加一些说明注释，说明各自的分辨率、检测间隔和电池消耗。
等等，我刚才发现BalancedMode的入口我写错了，应该是HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine而不是HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault，你帮我确认一下。
没问题，BalancedMode和HighQualityMode我都已经设置成从HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine进入了，DegradePerformance和BatteryOptimization也是这个入口。UltraFastMode和FastMode保持HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault。
ContinuousMonitoring的入口确认一下，应该是HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault对吧？因为它是整个监控体系的基础。
确认，ContinuousMonitoring、UltraFastMode、FastMode、ImprovePerformance都是从HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault进入。EmergencyMode和UserModeChange用HealthTech_EMR_Sync，AdaptiveAdjustment用HealthTech_LabAnalyzer。
注释内容我整理一下：UltraFastMode标注基础保护、224x224分辨率、500ms间隔、约2%每小时耗电；BalancedMode标注推荐模式、完整功能、原生分辨率、2000ms间隔、5-8%每小时；HighQualityMode标注最高精度、增强处理、内容密度分析、3000ms间隔、12-15%每小时。
三条注释都已添加。整个状态图结构完整了，从AppInitialization开始，经过四种初始模式选择，进入ContinuousMonitoring持续监控，支持性能升级、降级、自适应调整，还有紧急模式、用户手动切换、电池优化和热节流四种特殊场景，所有分支最终都能回到监控循环。
很好，这个设计覆盖了医疗AI应用在不同设备、不同电量、不同温度、不同网络条件下的自适应需求，HIPAA合规存储和诊断引擎、实验室分析、EMR同步各系统的职责也划分清楚了。
